seoTitle: How to Build an Invoice Generator with Airtable AI
metaDescription: Automate invoice creation in Airtable using AI fields to summarize line items and an automation trigger to generate documents on status change.
intro: Airtable AI fields can draft invoice summaries automatically from your linked line items, and combined with an automation trigger, you can generate a finished invoice the moment a status changes. This guide covers structuring your relational tables, configuring the AI prompt, and connecting the automation that kicks off document generation.

steps.heading: Structure your relational tables
steps.body: Set up interconnected tables for Clients, Invoices, and Line Items so your invoice data can pull from properly linked sources.

steps.heading: Add an Airtable AI field
steps.body: Add the specialized AI field type and design a custom text-generation prompt to summarize complex line items into a clean description.

steps.heading: Map dynamic client and line item data
steps.body: Feed dynamic client fields and linked line items into the AI prompt so it has the context it needs to generate accurate output.

steps.heading: Run the AI to compute summaries
steps.body: Let Airtable AI scan and automatically compute summaries, totals, and payment terms based on your prompt configuration.

steps.heading: Set up an automation trigger
steps.body: Go to the Automations tab and configure a "When record matches conditions" trigger to fire when an invoice's status changes.

steps.heading: Compile and export the final invoice
steps.body: Link the AI-generated text to Page Designer or an external PDF builder, then test the workflow to save the finished invoice as a hosted attachment.

faq.question: Does Airtable AI calculate totals and taxes automatically?
faq.answer: You can configure the AI prompt to extract totals, apply tax rules, and structure payment notes, though the accuracy depends on how you write the prompt and structure your data.

faq.question: What triggers the invoice generation process?
faq.answer: An Automation set to trigger "When record matches conditions" fires the workflow, typically based on an invoice status change.

faq.question: Can I turn the AI-generated invoice into a downloadable PDF?
faq.answer: Yes, by linking the AI-generated text to Page Designer or an external PDF tool, you can compile and export a finished document.

faq.question: Is Airtable AI included in every plan?
faq.answer: AI field access typically depends on your Airtable plan tier, so check your current plan's feature list before building this out.
